items.title_en: From panic to pricing in: Are markets past 'peak fear and sell-off' despite oil price surge?
items.title_zh: 从恐慌到定价：尽管油价飙升，市场是否已经过了“恐惧和抛售高峰”？

items.desc_zh: 投资者似乎已经消化了大部分地缘政治风险，并且对头条新闻的反应越来越少。

items.title_en: Hungarians vote in landmark election closely watched by EU, Russia, U.S.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利人在欧盟、俄罗斯和美国密切关注的具有里程碑意义的选举中投票
items.desc_en: Prime Minister Viktor Orban has carved ‌out a model of an "illiberal democracy" seen as a blueprint by populist movements.
items.desc_zh: 总理维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orban）制定了一个“非自由民主”模式，被民粹主义运动视为蓝图。

items.title_en: Why this disillusioned Trump voter spends hours searching Epstein files
items.title_zh: 为什么这位幻灭的特朗普选民要花几个小时搜索爱泼斯坦的文件
items.desc_en: Many who support the president have expressed frustration with how Trump's former attorney general Pam Bondi handled the Epstein files.
items.desc_zh: 许多支持总统的人对特朗普前司法部长帕姆·邦迪处理爱泼斯坦档案的方式表示失望。

items.title_en: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
items.title_zh: 新效果图显示，特朗普250英尺高的“凯旋门”将耸立在波托马克上空
items.desc_en: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."
items.desc_zh: 众议员唐·拜尔 (Don Beyer) 表示，“特朗普总统专注于一项由纳税人资助的虚荣项目，该项目会堵塞交通、遮挡我们的天际线，并高耸在圣地之上。”

items.title_en: Artemis II astronauts hurtle home from moon toward splashdown
items.title_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯二号宇航员从月球冲向溅落回家
items.desc_en: NASA’s four Artemis II astronauts return to Earth after a historic moon mission, with Orion set for Pacific splashdown shortly after 8 p.m. ET.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局 (NASA) 的四名阿耳忒弥斯二号 (Artemis II) 宇航员在完成历史性的月球任务后返回地球，猎户座 (Orion) 将于晚上 8 点过后不久坠落太平洋。等。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title_en: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
items.desc_en: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.
items.desc_zh: 该项目是承诺英国可能成为人工智能超级大国的一​​揽子技术投资的一部分。

items.title_en: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将终止对旧版 Kindle 的支持，引发用户强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.
items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。

items.title_en: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
items.title_zh: 希腊明年起禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
items.desc_zh: 法国和西班牙等其他欧洲国家也采取了类似举措。

items.title_en: Brit says he is not elusive Bitcoin creator named by New York Times
items.title_zh: 英国人表示他并不是《纽约时报》点名的难以捉摸的比特币创造者
items.desc_en: The British computer scientist and entrepreneur has denied being the man who the New York Times identified at Satoshi Nakamoto.
items.desc_zh: 这位英国计算机科学家兼企业家否认自己就是《纽约时报》认定的中本聪。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Is there a way to fix AI's problem with trust?
items.desc_zh: 有没有办法解决人工智能的信任问题？

items.title_en: Ex-Meta worker investigated for downloading 30,000 private Facebook photos
items.title_zh: 前 Meta 员工因下载 30,000 张 Facebook 私人照片而受到调查
items.desc_en: The former employee was fired from Meta after being suspected of downloading 30,000 photos, the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，这名前员工因涉嫌下载 30,000 张照片而被 Meta 解雇。

items.title_en: OpenAI encourages firms to trial four-day weeks to adapt to AI era
items.title_zh: OpenAI鼓励企业试用四天周以适应人工智能时代
items.desc_en: The ChatGPT-maker said its early policy ideas aim to prompt discussions about action needed as AI systems become more capable.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 制造商表示，其早期政策想法旨在促进有关随着人工智能系统变得更加强大而需要采取的行动的讨论。

items.title_en: China is winning one AI race, the US another - but either might pull ahead
items.title_zh: 中国正在赢得一场人工智能竞赛，美国则赢得另一场——但任何一方都可能领先
items.desc_en: Both sides don't want to let their rival dominate. And the competition may yet be transformed further.
items.desc_zh: 双方都不想让对手占据主导地位。而且竞争可能还会进一步转变。

items.title_en: Businesses scramble to get noticed by AI search
items.title_zh: 企业争先恐后地通过人工智能搜索引起关注
items.desc_en: Firms are changing the way they present information on their websites, so they get noticed by AI.
items.desc_zh: 公司正在改变他们在网站上呈现信息的方式，因此他们会受到人工智能的关注。
